subcodes.first_line: I adorn the head of the Tablet with the remembrance of God and His praise, and bear witness that there is no God but Him, He Who hath created the twigs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نزین راس اللوح بذکر الله و ثنائه و نشهد انه لا اله الا هو قد خلق الافنان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God
